title: docs: add local NVIDIA GPU workflow
author: riatzukiza

data.description: Adds a repo-local Dockerfile.local-gpu and documents a local single-GPU NVIDIA Docker workflow for iterative trainer compatibility testing and short local ablations.

novel_contributions: Repo-local Dockerfile for local NVIDIA GPU iteration
Documented local single-GPU Docker workflow in the README
Included build-essential to support local Triton/Inductor compilation paths
Provides a middle path between Apple Silicon local workflow and remote Runpod/H100 workflow
